title: tetragonolobus maritimus
intro: Tetragonolobus maritimus, also known as horse bean or four-angled bean, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its distinctive four-angled seed pods. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Tetragonolobus maritimus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a herbal tea or dried powder, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
